name: GrasshopperGeometryToWKT
description: Converts Grasshopper geometry (points, lines/polylines, polygons) to Well-Known Text. A branch with one geometry yields a single WKT; multiple uniform geometries yield a MULTI* WKT. No coordinate correction (geometry stays local).

inputParameters.name: geometry
inputParameters.description: Geometry or DataTree of geometries to convert (points, lines/polylines, polygons)

outputParameters.name: WKT
outputParameters.description: Well-Known Text per branch as DataTree
